title: I1A deterministic resource-scenario contract
acceptance_criteria: resource-scenario v1 documentation defines integer units, required fields, validation rules, examples, non-goals, and scientific limitations
validator accepts valid fixtures and rejects malformed fixtures with deterministic ordered errors
CLI validate-scenario supports human and JSON output with deterministic results and nonzero invalid exits
canonical .\eng.ps1 verify includes scenario validation and expected-negative checks without dependencies, providers, adapters, or network calls
baseline, red, green, and final evidence are generated under ignored artifacts and bound to the correct repository state
review packet and reviewer output are bound to the final source commit
candidate findings remain proposed and are not written to a canonical knowledge store
status metadata reports only the resource-scenario contract and validation as implemented while simulation, scheduler, Bitcoin, and AI capabilities remain false
